NearestVA: Ioannis A. Lougaris Veterans' Administration Medical Center
Veterans Benefits: Nevada has no individual income tax, so military retirement income is not taxed at the state level; qualifying veterans and disabled veterans may receive property-tax exemptions, and disabled veterans with at least a 60% permanent service-connected disability may apply the exemption toward real property or vehicle registration taxes.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Reno MEI scorecard; MAP Nevada Equality Profile 2026
Description: Reno is a high-desert Sierra Nevada city with an in-city VA medical center, no state income tax, strong Reno-Tahoe outdoor access, a visible arts/culture scene, and a growing technology and battery-economy cluster. Housing and living costs are high, summer is hot and very dry, winter brings some snow, and Washoe County presidential returns are narrowly swing-oriented.
